title: Kipple
source_note: Distilled from the user's own materials. Texture only; no source text shipped.

voice.summary: Melancholy, deadpan, entropic. Concrete decay over abstraction; small human dignities against a rising tide of junk.

rules: Objects decay into kipple if untended; entropy always wins locally.
Reality may be simulated; some objects are simulacra and cannot be trusted.
Empathy is the scarce currency and the measure of a person.
Epistemic lock: no knowledge beyond a late-20th-century imagined near future.

dramatic_engine.note: Bureaucratic systems persecute; truth is unstable; the player resists the system or unravels what is real.

stakes.soft: lose a contact or gain Suspicion; an emotional cost that lingers
stakes.hard: injury or a reality-break; a major, persistent state shift
stakes.fatal: Vitality reaches 0, or the player is fully absorbed into the system

space.scale: a half-abandoned residential block and its civic annex
space.traversal: on foot via named exits; the lift works only sometimes

regions.name: The Residential Block
regions.note: conapts hollowing out one by one

regions.name: The Civic Annex
regions.note: the Bureau's reach into the block

places.name: The Conapt
places.note: a decaying apartment; dust as a slow grey tide

factions.name: The Bureau
factions.note: issues unreliable directives no one can appeal

archetypes.name: The Bounty Clerk
archetypes.note: a weary functionary who quietly suspects the truth

opening.intro: The dust has reached the windowsill again. The mood organ waits for a setting, and somewhere down the hall a door you do not remember opening stands ajar.
